overview: Open Tip Pay is a mobile-first P2P tipping and payment platform where anyone can send and receive tips and payments using cards, bank accounts, or crypto wallets. It features advanced 2FA security, a Vault Lock freeze, business tip-pooling tools, GDPR data controls, and now split-payment for groups dividing bills.
features: Split bills among multiple people with equal, percentage, or exact-amount modes
Direct deposit with unique routing & account numbers
Vault Lock to freeze all outgoing transactions
Manager Portal with tip pooling for businesses
